google-drive.label: Google Drive focus
google-drive.plan_line: Google Drive for docs, sheets, and decision records where the team actually writes.
google-drive.base_notes: Search and read Google Drive files — Docs, Sheets, Slides, PDFs — via Google's official Drive MCP server (search files, read content, fetch metadata). Strong for product/strategy context: specs, planning docs, meeting notes, and decision records that live in Drive rather than a wiki. Read-only — authenticate with the drive.readonly scope; never create, edit, move, or delete files.
